athome.title: Before the ceremony
athome.description: If you'd like to meet us before the ceremony to have a drink together and chat, you're welcome!

rsvp.title: Your presence
rsvp.description1: It's very helpful to know if you'll celebrate with us.
rsvp.description2: For this reason we ask you to confirm your presence by
rsvp.notePlaceholder: leave a note if you don't eat fish 🐟, if you have food allergies or special requirements...click above!
rsvp.contactInfo: If you have questions or concerns, or if we accidentally forgot someone, or if other people are joining our party for important communications in general, contact us!
rsvp.networkError: Network error. Please try again in a few minutes.

where.title: Where
where.receptionText: after the ceremony we'll be delighted to celebrate together at
where.ceremonyDescription: 5:30 PM - Ceremony at Ceremony Location A
where.fullDescription: 5:30 PM - Ceremony at Ceremony Location A. Followed by reception at Reception Location B
where.calendarLocation: Ceremony Location A, Example City, Italy

gift.title: Wedding Gift List
gift.description1: Your presence will be the most beautiful gift for us and we don't ask for more than what we have.
gift.description2: If you wish, you can contribute to make our honeymoon unforgettable, we love traveling and discovering new places and people.

guestbook.title: Leave a message
guestbook.subtitle: Share your wishes with us!
guestbook.description: Your messages make this day even more special.
guestbook.noMessages: No messages yet. Be the first to leave a wish!
guestbook.successMessage: Message sent successfully! Thank you for your wishes.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Scroll to see our photos
gallery.share: share with us your photos and videos from our wedding

hotel.title: Accommodation
hotel.description1: If you'd like to stay a few more days, here's a list of example accommodations.
hotel.description2: We recommend booking as soon as possible!

invitation.greeting:
Hi! How are you? Hope everything is well.
We have fantastic news to share!

💍 We are excited to
invitation.toWedding:
to our wedding!
You will find all the details and confirm your presence on our website
invitation.toWeddingPlural:
to our wedding!
You will find all the details and confirm your presence on our website
invitation.closing:
We can't wait to celebrate together 🎉🎉!
Alessio & Beatrice

reminder.greeting:
Hi! How are you? Hope everything is well.
To organize our wedding party 🤵🏻👰🏻‍ in the best way, it's important to know the attendance of all guests.
reminder.weddingDate: Our wedding day will be July 24th, 2027 and it would be very helpful if
reminder.confirmPresence:
confirm your presence on the digital invitation
by *June 24th, 2027*
reminder.thanks:
Thank you for your kindness and understanding.
Alessio & Beatrice

confirm.promptSingle: let us know if you'll celebrate with us
confirm.promptPlural: let us know if you'll celebrate with us
